case_title: NEW ERA LENDING, LLC VS. PRISTINE SUN LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW ERA LENDING, LLC
NON SERVICE REPORT (TRANSACTION ID # 17036075) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW ERA LENDING, LLC

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW ERA LENDING, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PRISTINE SUN LLC HELMING, TROY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT; DECLARATION RE: VENUE; APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT SERVED ON TROY HELMING (TRANSACTION ID # 17106046) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW ERA LENDING, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEW ERA LENDING, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRISTINE SUN LLC HELMING, TROY $262,839.40 PRINCIPAL, $18,989.33 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $282,278.73, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
